SpiniX vs Toast Loyalty: FAQ

Can I use SpiniX if I already have Toast POS?

Yes. SpiniX is POS-independent. Keep Toast for payments and order management, use SpiniX for loyalty, reviews, and guest engagement. They don't conflict. You just drop the $185/mo Marketing Essentials add-on.

Does Toast Loyalty have gamification?

No. Toast Loyalty is purely points-based (earn X points per dollar, redeem for rewards). No spin wheels, no instant-win mechanics, no variable rewards.

Is Toast Loyalty really $185/month?

Toast bundles loyalty into their "Marketing Essentials" package at $185/mo, which also includes gift cards and email/SMS marketing. You can't buy loyalty separately. This is on top of your Toast POS subscription ($69-165+/mo).

Which is better for Google review generation?

SpiniX, by far. Toast Loyalty doesn't include review generation at all. You'd need a separate tool like Birdeye or Podium ($200-300/mo). SpiniX has it built-in — 33% of guests leave a review after spinning the wheel.

What if I'm switching away from Toast POS entirely?

With Toast Loyalty, you lose everything — it only works with Toast POS. With SpiniX, your loyalty program is completely independent. Switch to Square, Clover, Lightspeed, or anything else without losing a single guest.

Is €29/month really the full price?

Yes. €29/month flat. Unlimited guests, unlimited spins, unlimited emails, Apple/Google Wallet passes, review collection. No per-visit charges, no add-on fees, no hardware costs. First month is 90% off (€2.90).

Can I export my guest data from SpiniX?

Yes. Your guest email list is yours. Export it anytime as CSV. With Toast, your loyalty data is locked inside their ecosystem.

Ready to stop overpaying for loyalty?

Try SpiniX for €2.90 your first month. Works with any POS — including Toast. No contracts.
